name: Cranberry Port Relish
recipeIngredient: 3 cups (12 oz package) fresh or frozen cranberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cranberries in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Add the cranberries and continue to simmer for another 20-30 minutes.
4. Toward the end of cooking, the relish will become very thick. Stir frequently to prevent it from sticking to the pan.
